title: Lindsay Jamieson Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Lindsay Jamieson Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Lindsay Jamieson
Khoury Faculty
BS in Computer Science and Math, DePauw University
Portland Campus
In high school, Lindsay Jamieson started taking computer science classes in 10th grade — an opportunity that she believes should be available to students nationwide. Now, as Khoury College’s coordinator of K-12 CS education, she’s looking to bring that opportunity to more schools by educating teachers about the field.
“[Computer science is] just a normal part of life. And computer science can be the integrated discipline that it really is
Lindsay Jamieson, Coordinator of K-12 CS Education
Explore all Khoury Stories
